name: Zara
summary: Zara achieved a F (27.6/100) due to their explicit performance across our three pillars. In Planet, they fall behind with 30.8/100 due to a severe lack of verifiable environmental or material transparency commitments. In People, they score a concerning 25.0/100, indicating severe gaps in verified supplier audits or significant government red flags (OSHA/CBP violations). Finally, in Animals, they score 25.0/100 because of an absence of strict public animal welfare commitments or certified raw material tracking.

fti.name: Fashion Transparency Index
fti.context: Part of Inditex group; scored 50% on supply chain transparency.
